defaultStyle.icon: Centered painterly game glyph, early modern Spanish tercio era, dark iron frame, worn bronze and dull gold accents, no text, no modern objects, no fantasy.
defaultStyle.scene: Wide painterly browser RPG scene, early modern Spanish tercio era, muddy grounded realism, muted color, no readable text, no modern objects, no fantasy.
defaultStyle.mature: Indirect SFW consequence image only: silhouettes, documents, closed doors, equipment returned, sickness, shame, corruption, loss. No explicit sex, no sexualized body, no gore, no explicit amputation.

waves.goal: Generate game-native icons that can replace lucide-react imports.
Generate city and off-duty soldier locations.
Generate food and consumable item art.
Generate special mission maps, scenes, bosses, and node icons.
Generate mature SFW discharge and forced-retirement event scenes.
